prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约21037→22633→24886→24132→29555名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近两年累计后移约5400名；2025年基准约29555名，为近年最高（ 位次数字最大），表明竞争持续加剧；该校在湖北物理类招生计划2021年91人、2022年84人、2023年84人、2024年82人、2025年78人，逐年小幅缩减；2026年（ §7）计划78人，与2025年持平，未进一步缩招，对竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第135位持续上升至2026年第85位，近 年排名提升显著，学校综合实力和认可度增强，对考生吸引力有所上升；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因招聘公告条件设置不当引发舆情，但属管理层面事件， 对本科招生直接影响有限；抖音热度排名第76位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；第五轮学科评估中植物保护获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与农林 特色一致；其余学科未进入A档，整体学科竞争力在211高校中处于中游。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，贵州 大学在上述领域设有对应专业，对考生有一定吸引力；湖北省2026年物理类考生约25.15万人，较2025年略有增加，竞争基数扩大；贵州大学位于贵州省，距湖北省较远，属于跨省报考；该校在湖北招生计划占其全国总计划比例较小，地域偏好对报考热度影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后 移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、考生规模略有增加及学校排名上升带来的吸引力增强，在2025年基准29555名基础上预计位次继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约29705名，区间29205– 30205名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 21037 → 22633 → 24886 → 24132 → 29555, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5400 positions in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is about 29555, the highest in recent years (largest ranking number), indicating intensifying competition; the university's enrollment plan in Hubei for Physics Category was 91 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 84 in 2023, 82 in 2024, and 78 in 2025, gradually decreasing year by year; the 2026 plan (§7) is 78, unchanged from 2025, with no further reduction, slightly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has continuously risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing its appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions in recruitment announcements causing public opinion, but this is a management-level incident with limited direct impact on undergraduate admissions; Douyin popularity ranking is 76th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline, consistent with its agricultural and forestry characteristics; other disciplines did not enter the A tier, placing the overall disciplinary competitiveness at a mid-level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social demand; Guizhou University offers corresponding majors in these fields, attracting some candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei in 2026 is about 251,500, slightly increased from 2025, expanding the competition base; Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, far from Hubei, making it a cross-province application; the university's enrollment plan in Hubei accounts for a small proportion of its national total, so regional preference has limited impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a slight increase in candidate numbers, and the enhanced attractiveness due to the university's rising ranking, the ranking is expected to continue a slight backward shift based on the 2025 baseline of 29555; the predicted minimum ranking is about 29705, with a range of 29205–30205.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 29205–30205, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 29000), prioritize competitive majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; for rankings near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 30000), it is advisable to mainly choose less popular Tier 2 majors to ensure admission probability.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has risen continuously from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing its appeal to candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to improper conditions in recruitment announcements causing public opinion, but this is a management-level incident with limited direct impact on undergraduate admissions; its Douyin popularity ranking is 76th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, consistent with its agricultural and forestry characteristics; History Category enrollment majors are mainly in literature, law, economics, and management, with low correlation to its advantageous disciplines.

预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the small expansion of 7.7% in 2026, a slight increase in candidate numbers, and the rising university ranking, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 4835; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5008, with a range of 4508–5508.
